description: MCP Filesystem Server tool definitions (reference only — NOT passed to model at inference time). These schemas define the target tools the specialist model is trained to call.

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: Get a detailed listing of all files and directories in a specified path. Results distinguish between files and directories with [FILE] and [DIR] prefixes.

path.description: Path to the directory to list

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read the complete contents of a file from the file system. Handles various text encodings.

path.description: Path to the file to read

tools.name: search_files
tools.description: Recursively search for files and directories matching a pattern.

pattern.description: Glob pattern to match against file/directory names

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Create a new file or completely overwrite an existing file with new content.

path.description: Path to the file to write

content.description: Content to write to the file

tools.name: create_directory
tools.description: Create a new directory or ensure a directory exists. Creates parent directories if needed.

path.description: Path to the directory to create

tools.name: edit_file
tools.description: Make a targeted edit to a file by replacing specific text with new text.

path.description: Path to the file to edit

old_text.description: The exact text to find and replace

new_text.description: The text to replace it with

tools.bridge_notes: Bridge converts to MCP server format: {path, edits: [{oldText: old_text, newText: new_text}]}

tools.name: move_file
tools.description: Move or rename a file or directory to a new location.

source.description: Current path of the file or directory

destination.description: New path for the file or directory

tools.name: directory_tree
tools.description: Get a recursive tree structure of all files and directories under a path.

path.description: Path to the root directory for the tree
